backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (header, hero, about, services, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend file, serving as a human-readable index of the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point with primary meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD Organization schema, Google Fonts preload, and favicon for Nimai Technologies.
frontend/public/favicon.svg: SVG favicon featuring a dark blue rounded square with an indigo neural-network path icon representing Nimai Technologies branding.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the sitemap at nimaitechnologies.com.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the homepage, privacy-policy, and terms-and-conditions URLs with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router with a shared Header layout and three routes: home (all sections), /privacy-policy, and /terms-and-conditions.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About Us section rendering an H2 heading, two-column vision/mission content with a pillar checklist, and three glassmorphism highlight cards for Innovation, Security, and Institutional Growth.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: A contact section component with a validated form that composes a pre-filled WhatsApp message and opens it in a new tab when submitted. Collects institution name, contact person, email, phone, and message fields.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the Nimai Technologies brand, quick navigation links with smooth scroll, and a list of service links that open pre-filled WhatsApp chats. Includes a copyright notice and WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware background blur, desktop nav links with smooth scrolling, a 'Get Demo' CTA button, and a mobile hamburger drawer menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section featuring an animated canvas neural-network particle effect, floating orbs, a headline, and CTA buttons linking to the contact section and a pre-filled WhatsApp URL.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section rendering a grid of five AI service cards (LLM integration, admissions automation, predictive analytics, dashboard, and security), each with a WhatsApp inquiry link and descriptive content.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a 'Why Choose Us' marketing section with five feature cards (admin workload reduction, AI decisions, security, future-proof tech, scalability), each showing an icon, stat, and description on a dark background.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed for this static site, as all interactions use client-side WhatsApp URL redirects.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines a corporate blue/indigo CSS design token system for light and dark modes, and declares reusable component utility classes like glassmorphism cards and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Static Privacy Policy page for Nimai Technologies detailing data collection, usage, and protection practices, with a branded dark header and back-to-home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/TermsAndConditions.ts: Static Terms & Conditions page for Nimai Technologies covering acceptance of terms, permitted service use, and intellectual property, with a branded dark header and back-to-home navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), OKLCH-based color tokens, brand/WhatsApp palettes, border radii, and box shadows, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current build state (version 3) of the Nimai Technologies corporate website project, recording architectural decisions, existing implemented features, known issues, and image requirements for a hard-coded HTML/CSS/JS site with WhatsApp integration and SEO markup.
